mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT ON (l.instance_id, l.frequency) l.instance_id, l.frequency, l.collect_time AS last_collect_time, l.duration_ms AS last_duration_ms, l.metric_count AS last_metric_count, l.success AS last_success, l.error_message AS last_error_message, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM collect_log s WHERE s.instance_id = l.instance_id AND s.frequency = l.frequency AND s.collect_time >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS total_24h, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM collect_log s WHERE s.instance_id = l.instance_id AND s.frequency = l.frequency AND s.collect_time >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND s.success = TRUE) AS success_24h FROM collect_log l ORDER BY l.instance_id, l.frequency, l.collect_time DESC
